svg.title: Global conceptual architecture — layered functional block diagram
svg.desc: Four functional layers stacked vertically: presentation, session logic, clinical modules, and infrastructure. A transversal safety module spans layers 2 through 3 on the right side.

g.text: Presentation · demographics · age check · terms of use
LLM triage · EMERGENCY / ASSISTANCE / TALK / MISENSE
FSM · mhGAP-IG v2.0 · SUI & DEP protocols
Post-referral check · therapeutic black hole prevention
MongoDB · session history · PDF reports · specialist dashboard
